old_value: {"id":"broadside-e37d.6","title":"Delivery fan-out and worker","description":"When a post is created, query followers for the persona, deduplicate by shared_inbox_uri (fall back to inbox_uri), insert one delivery_queue row per unique inbox. Per-domain circuit breaker: 10 consecutive failures triggers 1-hour pause (in-memory state).
